disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: Bend doctor on hantavirus ship released from quarantine - bendbulletin.com
updates.body_en: Bend doctor on hantavirus ship released from quarantine bendbulletin.com

updates.body_en: Irish on hantavirus-hit cruise ship released safely from 42-day quarantine The Irish Times

updates.body_en: WHO to declare end of hantavirus outbreak on July 2 Plataforma Media
updates.summary_zh: WHO 宣布将于7月2日结束汉坦病毒疫情。

updates.body_en: US CDC to wind down hantavirus response Medical Buyer

updates.body_en: CDC concludes response to hantavirus outbreak on cruise upi.com

updates.body_en: Deadly Hantavirus outbreak should end on 2 July, WHO says Euronews
